section_title: Saving of other proceedings:-- Any powers by this Act conferred on the Court shall be in addition to and not in
content:
281. Saving of other proceedings:-- Any powers by this Act conferred on the Court shall be in addition to and not in
restriction of, any existing powers of instituing proceedings against any contributory or debtor of the company, or the estate
of any contributory or debtor for the recovery of any call or other sums.
Enforcement of and appeal from Orders
